content.en:
More than 8 million ancient coins, plus the ancient coins that Ye Tian now owns, have reached more than 10 million ancient coins.

With so many ancient coins, if he encounters something good later, he will bid directly and spend them all.

However, he has not yet encountered a treasure that makes him feel excited.

Soon, other auction items were presented for auction.

Some of them are indeed useful to Ye Tian, but they have not yet reached the level of excitement, and his net worth is limited, so he naturally will not bid indiscriminately.

Soon.

An auction item attracted Ye Tian.

"The next auction item is an Eternal Primordial Treasure - the Ruin Sun Disk, which can deduce and perfect the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, the ordinary Eternal Dao Secret Technique can only make the Eternal Dao Transformation Realm powerhouse have a success rate of less than one percent, while the top Eternal Dao Secret Technique can make the Eternal Dao Sect have a success rate of more than thirty percent. "

"In addition, there is still a slight chance that the market will be perfect, and there is a slight chance of performing one's own eternal Dao species. "

"Of course, the Ruin Sun Disc is also flawed, and every time it urges the Consummation of the Ruin Sun, it will damage the foundation, and it will take a lot of precious mythical spiritual objects to heal. "

As soon as the auctioneer finished speaking, an Eternal Dao Realm sitting in the Void Treasure Hall spoke: "The Sun Disc, the side effects are too great, if you use it regularly, the side effects will continue to stack, and the background is too serious, even those of us who are Eternal Dao Realm dare not use it." "

The side effects are so great that it is hard to imagine to achieve.

The auctioneer had only mentioned it in passing through, but many of the Eternal Dao Realms present had heard of this Eternal Primordial Treasure.

The auctioneer said embarrassedly: "Although the side effects are not small, but its effect is also very large, and the starting price is 3 million ancient coins now!"

Those Eternal Dao Realm can't look down on the Ruins Sun Disk, but there are still Eternal Dao powerhouses who are willing to bid, and almost all of them are bidding on behalf of the forces behind them.

For example, sacrificing a batch of Eternal Dao Transformations, damaging their foundations, and perfecting the Eternal Perfection Dao Secret Technique little by little, after a long time, they will be able to obtain a top-notch Eternal Absolute Dao Secret Technique, which is also quite good!

As for those who are eternal and powerhouse, are they willing to sacrifice themselves? As long as the interests are sufficient, they are willing to sacrifice.

For example, some Eternal Dao powerhouses have a damaged foundation, and they have no chance to break through the Eternal Dao realm, so it is okay to sacrifice their foundation slightly.

That's why these forces will bid for the market yen.

But those top forces don't lack top-notch Eternal Dao Secret Techniques, so they can't look down on them, and they won't bid for them.

......

"Sunrise Disk, Eternal Treasure!"

Ye Tian has been in the Auga Realm for a long time, and he also knows what the Eternal Primordial Treasure is, it is a treasure that surpasses the Innate Primordial Treasure, a treasure bred by a special treasure land, and its value is very high.

Even in the Eternal Dao Realm, they are eager to obtain an Eternal Primordial Treasure.

If the Innate Primordial Treasure is suitable for the Legendary Dao Realm, the Mythical Dao Realm, and the Eternal Dao Realm, then the Eternal Primordial Treasure is suitable for the Eternal Dao Realm and the level of the Lord.

Of course, it also depends on the role of the Eternal Primordial Treasure.

Some Eternal Primordial Treasures are very spicy and not of high value, so naturally no one buys them for auction.

But most of the Eternal Primordial Treasures have extremely powerful abilities.

"The Sun Disc can deduce and perfect the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, it is useful to me, it is nothing to me if it hurts the foundation, just change it to a replica body. This Eternal Primordial Treasure suits me so much that I must take it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition, the market sun disc can also have the hope of deducing the eternal Dao species, which makes him even more excited.

He knew what the Eternal Dao Seed was, and after the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules reached the consummation realm, the next step was to condense the Eternal Dao Seed.

It is said that those top Eternal Dao Realms and the level of the Realm of the Nation Lord all possess the Eternal Dao Species.

Therefore, if he breaks through to the Eternal Dao Realm in the future, he will also have to condense the Eternal Dao Seed.

The Sunset Disc is where the hope lies!

"4,000,000 Agu coins!"

Ye Tian also began to bid.

Luo Wushuang was surprised, "Ye Tian, you want to bid for the ruin sun disc? This thing has a lot of side effects, you can't damage your foundation, it is said that after using it many times, even the most powerful mythical spirit object can't heal the foundation." Its previous owner was a powerful Eternal Dao Realm, but as a result, its foundation was damaged, and its cultivation regressed. "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian didn't say much.

And Luo Wushuang didn't ask much, what Ye Tian did, she couldn't control it, and she was not qualified to do it.

As bids continued to rise, the auction price soared to nearly 10 million augocoins.

At this time, many forces gave up.

After all, you have to pay a lot of money to use the ruin sun disk, and it is not worth paying a lot of ancient coins.

In the end, there were only a few Eternal Dao powerhouses left to compete.

When Ye Tian reported the high price of 11 million ancient coins, he no longer used Daohua to compete with him.

In this way, Ye Tian bid for this ruin disc.

At this time.

He was excited, but on the surface he was calm.

For him, the value of the ruin disc to him far exceeds that of other treasures, and this treasure alone is enough to participate in the auction this time.

For the next auction items, Ye Tian watched the show, he didn't go to the auction, and there weren't many ancient coins.

And later, there was also the Eternal Origin Treasure Auction, a group of Eternal Dao Realm to bid, the scene was very intense, and there was even an Eternal Origin Treasure, and the bidding price soared to 30 million ancient coins.

Only the Eternal Dao Realm can be taken out, and it has to be a relatively powerful Eternal Dao Realm.

At last.

A finale item was taken out, and it was a top-notch Eternal Dao Divine Weapon, which provoked several top-notch Eternal Dao Realm to bid frantically, and auctioned off for a terrifying price of 300 million ancient coins.

......

After the auction, Ye Tian went to pay the ancient coins and took away his auction item, the Ruin Sun Disk.

Subsequently, he and Luo Wushuang returned to Roselle City.

On the way back, the void froze, and it was surprising that there was an eternal Daoist powerhouse who used the innate primordial treasure to block the void, and it was not an innate primordial treasure.

Moreover, the person who made the shot was not an eternal and Taoist powerhouse, but several.

Whew!!

Six powerhouses in the late stage of Eternal Daohua appeared and intercepted Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang.

The aura of these six Eternal Dao powerhouses was very powerful, much stronger than those Eternal Dao powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

At this time.

When Luo Wushuang saw these six, his face immediately changed, especially one of the powerhouses of the late stage of Eternal Daohua, and he was also a well-known powerhouse of the late stage of Daohua in the ancient kingdom.
